mapper.sql: id, drug_id, batch_number, quantity, production_date, expiry_date, status, location, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM drug_stock WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} ORDER BY expiry_date
SELECT FROM drug_stock WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY expiry_date
mapper.sql: WHERE status = 1 AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND expiry_date <= (CURRENT_DATE + (#{days} || ' days')::interval)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM drug_stock
ORDER BY expiry_date LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_stock (drug_id, batch_number, quantity, production_date, expiry_date, status, location) VALUES (#{drugId}, #{batchNumber}, #{quantity}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{status}, #{location})
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_stock SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_stock SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
